block_00: 🎂You're in for the birthday ticket competition!
block_05: Get a ticket for each $10 turnover and get an opportunity to win a share of $25,000
block_08: We are excited to invite you to our ticket competition! By trading on your real balance, you can earn unique tickets that will enter you into the raffle. You will get a chance to top up your real account at our expense in honor of the company’s birthday!
block_09: Every weekday we will give away 50 tickets for the prize amount of $30 each; over the weekend, 60 tickets for $50 each; and at the end of the trading competition, there will be a grand drawing of 100 tickets for $100 each. Anyone can become a winner! A total of $25,000 will be up for grabs! Don't miss your chance!
block_12: The competition will start on November 27 at 7 am UTC and finish on December 7 at 7 am UTC
block_13: Trade options on the real balance and reach at least a $10 turnover till 7 am UTC of the next day
block_14: Receive one ticket for every round of $10 turnover. The more tickets you get, the higher the odds for being the lucky winner of the prize. Your ticket IDs will be emailed to you within 24 hours.
block_15: The winning ticket will be selected at random every day at 3 pm UTC.
block_16: The results of the draw will be sent to you along with a screencast.
block_17: All your tickets (except those that have already won) will be eligible for taking part in the grand drawing on December 7.
block_18: The winners will receive the prize amount on their trading balance every day before 10 pm UTC.
block_19: Don't miss this opportunity to take part in the event of the year. Start trading now and earn more tickets to increase your chances of winning.
